{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/114768995?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/offset", "id": 114768995, "login": "offset", "node_id": "U_kgDOBtc8Yw", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/offset", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 3.7, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:L/I:N/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1289", "name": "Improper Validation of Unsafe Equivalence in Input"}], "description": "# Summary

`Config.registryFor` selected a per-registry credential / CA / mirror block by checking `strings.HasSuffix(name, fqdn)` after stripping a single trailing dot. 
The match has no boundary between the configured FQDN and any preceding characters in the request hostname.
A registry configured as `[registries."ghcr.io."]` is therefore also applied to any image pulled from a host whose name happens to end in the literal byte sequence `ghcr.io`, 
including attacker-registered domains such as `evilghcr.io.` 
The imagepuller would then send the configured `Authorization` header (basic auth, registry token, or identity token), trust the configured custom CA bundle,
follow the configured mirror, or honour `insecure-skip-verify`, on requests to that hostname.

# Prerequisites

For this to be applicable, an image or layer must be pulled from a "sibling" domain ending in one of the FQDNs configured in the imagepuller config.
This may occur due to malicious intent or coincidentally.

# Impact

- Authentication header leaks to the sibling registry.
- If `insecure-skip-verify` is set on an FQDN, TLS will also not be verified for the sibling registry.
- Mirrors configured for an FQDN will also be used with the sibling registry.

## Not impacted

Image integrity is **not** impacted. Image bytes remain pinned by digest in the policy and are validated after the pull.
This advisory does not allow code substitution.

# Workaround

- If possible, configure explicit subdomains in the imagepuller config. A configuration for `[registries.".example.registry"]` is unaffected, only `[registries."example.registry"]` is potentially affected.
- Audit images and layers configured in the deployment for the existence of sibling domains.

# Patches

After this patch, registry matches are determined by exact label equality instead of suffix matching.
Each `.`-separated part of the FQDN must be an exact match with the corresponding label in the image reference.

# Severity

- `AV:N` because the leak is over the network to a registry under the attacker's control. 
- `AC:H` because exploitation requires the operator to have configured a registry FQDN without a leading `.` AND the attacker to control a sibling-suffix domain that the deployment will pull from.
- `PR:N` for the eventual recipient. 
- `S:U` because impact stays in the imagepuller. 
- `C:L` for credential leak (no integrity / availability impact).", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-01T18:43:55Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-01T18:43:55Z", "references": ["https://github.com/edgelesssys/contrast/security/advisories/GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx", "https://github.com/edgelesssys/contrast/commit/10826b1d82613025767fb094e8aa51a7dcfbd2a1", "https://github.com/edgelesssys/contrast/releases/tag/v1.21.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/edgelesssys/contrast/security-advisories/GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx", "severity": "low", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/edgelesssys/contrast", "summary": "Contrast's Imagepuller registryFor uses unanchored suffix matching, leaking auth credentials and trusted CA configuration to sibling-domain registries", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-01T18:43:57Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-6c87-g9pw-78fx", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.21.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "go", "name": "github.com/edgelesssys/contrast"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 1.20.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: Contrast's Imagepuller registryFor uses unanchored suffix matching, leaking auth credentials and trusted CA configuration to sibling-domain registries
